# pangolin_site_resource_role (Resource)

Assigns a role to a Pangolin private site resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pangolin_site_resource_role" "example" {
  site_resource_id = pangolin_site_resource.example.id
  role_id          = pangolin_role.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role_id` (Number) The ID of the role to assign.
- `site_resource_id` (Number) The ID of the private site resource.
